name: Crockpot Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight, drain, rinse, and drain again.
(Hint: You can shorten the soaking time by covering the beans with 6-8 cups of water and placing a vented piece of saran wrap over them. Cook in the microwave for 10 minutes, then let sit on the counter for 1 hour.)
2. Combine all ingredients in the crockpot and cook for 3-4 hours on high or all day on low.
3. Allow the soup to cool completely in the refrigerator for 1-2 days before serving to enhance the flavor.
